mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name, p.specification, p.unit, p.category, s.quantity, s.warning_quantity, CASE WHEN s.quantity <= s.warning_quantity THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS low_stock FROM product p LEFT JOIN stock s ON p.id = s.product_id
p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productName}, '%')
ORDER BY p.id ASC

SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name, p.specification, p.unit, p.category, s.quantity, s.warning_quantity, CASE WHEN s.quantity <= s.warning_quantity THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS low_stock FROM product p LEFT JOIN stock s ON p.id = s.product_id WHERE p.id = #{productId}
